title: elytrigia arizonica
intro: Elytrigia arizonica, also known as Arizona wildrye, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Elytrigia arizonica is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
